mapper.sql: R.ATRZ_DOC_ID , R.OPEN_YN , R.OPEN_DT , R.ATRZ_RCVR_ID , U.USER_NM AS userNm , D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm , J.JBGD_NM AS jbgdNm , FD.FILE_PATH AS filePath

FROM AUTHORIZATION_DOCUMENT_RECEIVER R LEFT JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = R.ATRZ_RCVR_ID LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN JOB_GRADE J ON J.JBGD_CD = U.JBGD_CD LEFT JOIN FILE_DETAIL FD ON FD.FILE_ID = U.USER_IMG_FILE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AUTHORIZATION_DOCUMENT_RECEIVER( ATRZ_DOC_ID, OPEN_YN, OPEN_DT, ATRZ_RCVR_ID ) VALUES ( #{atrzDocId}, COALESCE(#{openYn}, 'N'), #{openDt}, #{atrzRcvrId} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY R.ATRZ_DOC_ID DESC, R.ATRZ_RCVR_ID

SELECT
WHERE R.ATRZ_RCVR_ID = #{atrzRcvrId} ORDER BY R.OPEN_DT DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
